input.sql: /* SHARDINGSPHERE_HINT: NONE_UNIQUE_KEY_SCENARIO=ENCRYPT, ENCRYPT_COLUMN_ITEM_TYPE=LIKE_QUERY */ select username from t_config where username is null limit 1;

output.sql: select plain_username from `encrypt_ds`.t_config where like_query_username is null and plain_username is not null limit 1;

input.sql: /* SHARDINGSPHERE_HINT: NONE_UNIQUE_KEY_SCENARIO=ENCRYPT, ENCRYPT_COLUMN_ITEM_TYPE=LIKE_QUERY */ select username from t_config where username is null and rownum >= 1;

output.sql: select plain_username from "ENCRYPT_DS".t_config where like_query_username is null and plain_username is not null and rownum >= 1;
